recommendations.title: Happily Ever After
recommendations.overview: Is love compatible with coupledom? And what of freedom and fidelity? These are some of the questions facing two married men.

recommendations.title: Hana & Alice
recommendations.overview: Two teenage best pals attracted to the same boy end up scrambling his life after he walks into a door and is knocked unconscious.

recommendations.title: April Story
recommendations.overview: In spring, a girl leaves the island of Hokkaido to attend university in Tokyo. Once there, she is asked to reveal why she wanted to go there in the first place.

recommendations.title: Head-On
recommendations.overview: With the intention to break free from the strict familial restrictions, a suicidal young woman sets up a marriage of convenience with a forty-year-old addict, an act that will lead to an outburst of envious love.

recommendations.title: The Golden Glove
recommendations.overview: A serial killer strikes fear in the hearts of residents of Hamburg during the early 1970s.

recommendations.title: The Namesake
recommendations.overview: The American-born son of Indian immigrants strives to fit in among his fellow New Yorkers despite his family's unwillingness to let go of their traditional ways.

recommendations.title: The Reluctant Fundamentalist
recommendations.overview: In New York, a Pakistani native finds that his American Dream has collapsed in the wake of the 9/11 terrorist attacks.

recommendations.title: Queen of Katwe
recommendations.overview: A young girl overcomes her disadvantaged upbringing in the slums of Uganda to become a Chess master.

recommendations.title: Le Brio
recommendations.overview: After an incident, a brilliant professor known for his outbursts is forced to mentor the student he wronged for a speech contest.

recommendations.title: Elizabeth
recommendations.overview: The story of the ascension to the throne and the early reign of Queen Elizabeth the First, the endless attempts by her council to marry her off, the Catholic hatred of her and her romance with Lord Robert Dudley.
